1d:T6fc,
# Tailwind CSS 最佳实践

Tailwind CSS 是一个功能优先的 CSS 框架，以下是一些最佳实践。

## 1. 使用 @apply 谨慎

避免过度使用 `@apply`，它会破坏 Tailwind 的原子性：

```css
/* ❌ 不推荐 */
.btn {
  @apply px-4 py-2 bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-lg;
}

/* ✅ 推荐 */
<button class="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-lg">
  Click me
</button>
```

## 2. 组件提取

将重复的模式提取为组件：

```tsx
// ❌ 重复
<div class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white rounded-lg shadow">
<div class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white rounded-lg shadow">

// ✅ 提取为 Card 组件
function Card({ children, className }) {
  return (
    <div className={cn(
      "flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white rounded-lg shadow",
      className
    )}>
      {children}
    </div>
  )
}
```

## 3. 响应式设计

使用移动优先的响应式设计：

```tsx
// 小屏幕默认，移动端友好
<div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">

// 条件类
<div className={cn(
  "p-4",
  isActive ? "bg-blue-500" : "bg-gray-500"
)}>
```

## 4. 暗色模式

使用 `dark:` 变体：

```tsx
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 text-gray-900 dark:text-white">
  <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Hello World</h1>
</div>
```

## 5. 自定义配置

在 `tailwind.config.ts` 中扩展主题：

```ts
export default {
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        brand: {
          50: '#f0f9ff',
          500: '#0ea5e9',
          900: '#0c4a6e',
        }
      },
      animation: {
        'spin-slow': 'spin 3s linear infinite',
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## 总结

Tailwind CSS 的核心理念是实用优先，保持代码简洁和可维护是关键。1a:["$","div",null,{"className":"animate-slide-up","style":{"animationDelay":"0.1s"},"children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"h-px gradient-btn mb-12"}],["$","$L1c",null,{"source":"$1d"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"h-px gradient-btn mt-12"}]]}]
1b:["$","footer",null,{"className":"mt-12 pt-8 border-t border-border/50 animate-slide-up","style":{"animationDelay":"0.2s"},"children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center justify-between gap-4","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm text-muted-foreground","children":"感谢阅读，欢迎分享！"}],["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/","className":"gradient-btn text-white px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg font-medium inline-flex items-center gap-2","children":[["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide lucide-arrow-left w-4 h-4","aria-hidden":"true","children":[["$","path","1l729n",{"d":"m12 19-7-7 7-7"}],["$","path","x3x0zl",{"d":"M19 12H5"}],"$undefined"]}],"返回首页"]}]]}]}]
